texto: There were two books I remember changing my life as a introverted, bookish 14 year old. The Fountainhead by Ayn Rand and The Lord of the Rings by JRR Tolkien. One was set in a fantastic world, populated by outlandish characters,tired prose, foul monsters, evil incarnate and a message about losing one's humanity. The other book was about hobbits.
explicacao: Citação de Christopher Odell Homsley sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “There were two books I remember changing my life as a introverted, bookish 14 year old. The Fount…” articula reflexao, humorous, about em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
